nasb.text: This was in accordance with the eternal purpose which He carried out in Christ Jesus our Lord,

esv.text: This was according to the eternal purpose that he has realized in Christ Jesus our Lord,

cnv.text: 這都是照著　神在我們主基督耶穌裡所成就的永恆的旨意。

ccb.text: 这是上帝万世以前在我们主基督耶稣里定好的计划。

csbs.text: 这都是照着他在我们主基督耶稣里所成就的永恒心意。
